objects.name: Russian APT Turla builds long-term access tool with Kazuar Botnet evolution
objects.description: Russia-linked APT group Turla turned its Kazuar malware into a stealthy P2P botnet for long-term access to compromised systems. Russia-linked APT group Turla upgraded its Kazuar backdoor into a modular peer-to-peer botnet designed for stealth and persistent access to infected systems. Microsoft researchers say the malware allows attackers to maintain long-term control while making detection […]

external_references.description: Russian APT Turla builds long-term access tool with Kazuar Botnet evolution
